mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password_hash, type, token_version, login_fail_count, locked_until FROM t_user_auth WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE t_user_auth SET locked_until = CASE WHEN login_fail_count + 1 >= #{maxAttempts} THEN #{lockedUntil} ELSE NULL END, login_fail_count = CASE WHEN login_fail_count + 1 >= #{maxAttempts} THEN 0 ELSE login_fail_count + 1 END, updated_at = #{failedAt}, updated_by = NULL WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND (locked_until IS NULL OR locked_until <= #{failedAt})
